title: without express server modpack
description: A multiplayer-focused modpack made for our Minecraft server, offering a fresh experience for all playstyles.
body:
# About the Modpack
This modpack was carefully built for our own Minecraft server, with the goal of offering a fresh and engaging experience that supports a wide variety of playstyles. Whether you're into building, exploring, automation, magic, or just goofing around with friends — there's something here for you.

Designed with multiplayer in mind, the pack includes a balanced mix of content to encourage cooperation, creativity, and progression without overwhelming new players. Every mod has been chosen to enhance the server experience, ensuring performance, stability, and fun.

If you're looking for a modpack that brings players together while still letting everyone play their own way, this is it.
